creator: lightside@gmx.com
text: Possible to add localbase to USES, instead of CPPFLAGS and LDFLAGS defines, but I'm not sure about OPENSSL_CFLAGS="-I/usr/include", which configured to root location of so called base OpenSSL libraries. The security/openssl(-devel) port installs include and lib directories to ${LOCALBASE}, which may be found first, because of -isystem paths of Mk/Uses/localbase.mk. Therefore, I didn't propose USES+=localbase.
